name: normalize
description: Target a specific loudness level (LUFS) via ffmpeg loudnorm two-pass

input.description: Video or audio file to normalize

params.name: target
params.description: Platform preset. youtube = -14 LUFS, podcast = -16 LUFS, broadcast = -23 LUFS.

params.name: lufs
params.description: Target LUFS. Used only when --target is 'custom'.
